title: SonarMD Deploy Manifest
description: Bundle-based release contract. Validated by validate-release-contract. See docs/platform-spec.md.

build_root.description: Build output root directory. Default: dist.

lambda_tag.description: Optional pin: an immutable api release tag the cdk deploy uses for lambda code instead of the newest build. Consumed by the cdk deploy; empty string means unpinned.

identifier.description: Short identifier for tag/release naming (api, fe, mobile, cdk).

bundles.description: Deployable bundles produced by the build.

name.description: Bundle name. Must be unique within this manifest.

path.description: Bundle directory path relative to build root.

hosts.description: Canonical shape: env -> array of unique target identifiers this bundle deploys to in that env (s3 bucket, lambda function, ec2 hostname, fargate service, eas channel). Legacy shapes (flat string array; label -> string object) are still accepted during rollout but deprecated.

oneOf.description: Canonical: env key -> array of unique non-empty target strings.
Legacy (deprecated): flat list of target strings.
